summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification shard. The hydrated artifact covers 20 of 25 listed PRs; no shared canonical was invented. Hydrated open PRs are kept as independent backlog items because merge, fix, low-signal close, and instant close are disabled, and no duplicate/superseded relationship is established by the artifact. Five listed PRs lack hydrated preflight live state; one security-shaped missing item is routed to central security, and the remaining missing items need a targeted hydrated follow-up before classification.
